docs.title: MkDocs
docs.text:
For full documentation visit mkdocs.org.

For Material for MkDocs visit Material for MkDocs.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• python -m venv .venv - Create a Python virtual environment named .venv.
  • source .venv/bin/activate - Activate the Python virtual environment.

  • pip install mkdocs-material - Install MkDocs Material theme.

  • mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.

  • mkdocs serve --livereload - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.

  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

  • mkdocs gh-deploy - Build and deploy the MkDocs site to GitHub Pages.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: 개발 도구 및 필수 패키지 설치
docs.text:
dnf groupinstall "Development Tools" -y
dnf install gcc openssl-devel bzip2-devel libffi-devel zlib-devel wget make -y
